title: Blood Scythe
description: blood scythe, red scythe, scythe of arlecchino genshin
body:
## Blood Scythe Resource Pack

Transform your Minecraft experience with the **Blood Scythe Resource Pack** for version 1.21. This pack replaces the standard `netherite sword` with an intricately designed Blood Scythe, adding a touch of dark elegance to your adventures.

### Features:
- **3D Model**: The Blood Scythe features a detailed 3D model, providing a visually striking upgrade to your weapon.
- **Unique Design**: The Blood Scythe boasts a menacing blade with a deep crimson hue, giving your weapon a fierce and intimidating look.
- **High-Quality Textures**: Enjoy detailed and high-resolution textures that make the Blood Scythe stand out in any environment.
- **Immersive Experience**: Enhance your gameplay with the thematic style of the Blood Scythe, perfect for those who love a darker aesthetic.

### Installation:
1. Download the resource pack.
2. Place the file in the `resourcepacks` folder located in your `.minecraft` directory.
3. Activate the pack from the Resource Packs menu in-game.
4. Enjoy your new Blood Scythe!

Upgrade your Netherite sword to the Blood Scythe and bring a new level of excitement to your Minecraft adventures!
